title.en: Dodgers' Shohei Ohtani eyes 'being healthy the whole year,' shot at Cy Young
title.ja: 大谷翔平『今年は1年間健康でいたい』サイ・ヤング賞も視野に — 海外の反応

summaryJa: ESPNが報じた『大谷が今季フル稼働＆サイ・ヤング賞を狙う』という記事にr/mlbが反応。大半は『MVPは余裕、でもサイ・ヤングは無理』という見立てで、6人ローテ＆ドジャースの登板管理でイニングが稼げない問題、スキーンズら“投げることだけ考えてる”純粋な投手陣の壁が論点に。一方で『この男に“無理”と言い切るのはバカげてる』という擁護派、通算K/9歴代1位という数字を持ち出す派も。さらに『そもそもこのサイ・ヤング発言はESPN記者が盛った。大谷は健康でいたいとしか言ってない』という冷静なツッコミも入る。ジョーク勢は『どうせドジャースがトレード期限で受賞者を獲ってくる』というオチで締め。

comments.author: WolverineDDS
comments.bodyEn: I'm also eyeing both those things this year. I think Shohei has a bit better shot at the Cy Young than I do, but I have a better shot at staying healthy (I dont really do anything).
comments.bodyJa: 俺も今年その2つ（健康とサイ・ヤング）狙ってるわ。サイ・ヤングは翔平のほうがちょっと有利だと思うけど、健康でいることに関しては俺のほうが上だな（だって俺、基本なんもしてないから）

comments.author: bolshevik_rattlehead
comments.bodyEn: MVP? Absolutely. Cy Young? No chance.
comments.bodyJa: MVP？余裕。サイ・ヤング賞？それは無理。

comments.author: Minute-Classroom8919
comments.bodyEn: Yes! Big fan but I don't see Cy Young this season.
comments.bodyJa: それな！大ファンだけど、今季のサイ・ヤングはさすがに見えないわ

comments.author: bolshevik_rattlehead
comments.bodyEn: He's obviously got the talent, but in a six-man rotation he's never gonna get the innings
comments.bodyJa: 才能があるのは明らかだけど、6人ローテじゃイニングが絶対に足りないんだよな

comments.author: markjay6
comments.bodyEn: I think it's a combination of the six-man rotation and the Dodgers being super cautious with their pitching staff during the regular season to try to keep arms fresh for the postseason. So while I can see him reaching the 130 innings he pitched in 2021 and 2023, I doubt if he'll reach the 165 innings he pitched in 2022. And those restrictions can also prevent him from having spectacular complete game outings (shutouts or a no hitter) that earn attention and votes.
comments.bodyJa: 6人ローテと、ドジャースがポストシーズンに向けて肩を温存するために超慎重に投手を管理してることの合わせ技だと思う。2021・2023年の130イニングは届くだろうけど、2022年の165イニングは厳しい。しかも登板制限のせいで、票を集めるような派手な完投（完封やノーノー）も出しにくいんだよ

comments.author: caominh200206
comments.bodyEn: Lol if Yamamoto won't get it, Ohtani would never
comments.bodyJa: ｗ ヤマモト（山本由伸）が獲れないなら、大谷は永遠に無理だろ

comments.author: MediumAcceptable129
comments.bodyEn: Doesnt every pitcher have a shot at a cy young?
comments.bodyJa: そもそも投手なら誰でもサイ・ヤングの可能性はあるんじゃないの？

comments.author: Still-Cash1599
comments.bodyEn: Technically yes but in practice no. I can't find a single vote for a middle reliever over the 20 years of voting I looked over.
comments.bodyJa: 理屈の上ではYES、でも実際はNO。過去20年の投票を調べたけど、中継ぎ投手への票は1つも見つからなかったわ

comments.author: markjay6
comments.bodyEn: Ohtani pitched very few innings last season, but they were spectacular. Though he was far from qualifying, he led the majors among starting pitching in xERA, FIP, and strikeouts per 9 innings. He also has the highest career strikeout per 9 inning rate in MLB history. Ohtani has shown that when he sets his mind on things, he can blow away expectations. Cy Young would be a challenge for him, as he's only pitched over 135 innings once in his career, but, no, it wouldn't shock me if he got it.
comments.bodyJa: 大谷は去年のイニング数こそ少なかったけど、中身は規格外だった。規定到達には程遠かったとはいえ、先発投手のxERA・FIP・K/9でメジャートップ。しかも通算K/9はMLB史上1位だぞ。大谷は本気を出せば期待をぶっ飛ばしてくるのを何度も見せてきた。通算で135イニング超えが1回しかないからサイ・ヤングは確かに難題だけど、獲っても俺は驚かないね

comments.author: SwizzGod
comments.bodyEn: Unlikely? Sure. But to say "no chance" concerning this dude is a bit ludicrous of you ask me.
comments.bodyJa: 可能性が低い？そりゃそうだ。でもこの男に『無理(no chance)』って言い切るのは、言わせてもらえばちょっとバカげてるわ

comments.author: Devin_Kurant_GSW
comments.bodyEn: yea impossible is possible in him
comments.bodyJa: ああ、この男にとっては“不可能”が可能になるんだよ

comments.author: DependentLanguage540
comments.bodyEn: Agreed, would love to see it, but there's no chance. His competition will be pitchers who only have time to think about pitching, who can rest between half innings and rest/recover between starts. Also, his best chance to win it was back in 2021-2023 when he didn't have to go up against Paul Skenes.
comments.bodyJa: 同意、見たいのは山々だけど無理。ライバルは“投げることだけ”を考えてればいい投手たちで、攻撃の間も休めるし登板間も回復に充てられる。それに彼の最大のチャンスは、ポール・スキーンズと戦わずに済んだ2021〜2023年だったんだよ

comments.author: coopiemode
comments.bodyEn: I just don't know how you can bet against Skenes…
comments.bodyJa: そもそもスキーンズに賭けない理由が分からんわ…

comments.author: Oafah
comments.bodyEn: He's the second best starter on his team. I doubt it, but it would be cool to see. We're still all waiting for that 15 WAR season.
comments.bodyJa: 彼ってチーム内で2番目に良い先発だしな。可能性は低いと思うけど、見られたら胸熱ではある。まあ我々はまだ“15 WARシーズン”を待ってるわけだが

comments.author: _GeorgeBailey_
comments.bodyEn: No shot he ever comes close to a 15 WAR season
comments.bodyJa: 15 WARシーズンに近づくことすら絶対にないって

comments.author: markjay6
comments.bodyEn: 15, no. But 12 or 13 are very possible if he stays healthy all season.
comments.bodyJa: 15は無理。でも12か13なら、1年間健康でいられれば十分あり得るぞ

comments.author: _GeorgeBailey_
comments.bodyEn: Very possible? No. His best year is 10.4 total WAR. He's now 31. It's not very possible he has a year far better than his current career year.
comments.bodyJa: “十分あり得る”？いや無い。彼のベストは通算10.4 WARだぞ。もう31歳だ。キャリアハイをはるかに超える年が来るなんて、そう簡単にはあり得ない

comments.author: markjay6
comments.bodyEn: His hitting has improved over the years and, judging by his regular season performance last year (FIP, xERA, K/9), his pitching may have as well. He averaged 4.7 pitching WAR in 2021-2023 and 7.9 batting WAR in 2024-2025. Let's see what he can do with a full season of both.
comments.bodyJa: 打撃は年々伸びてるし、去年の数字（FIP・xERA・K/9）を見るに投球も上がってるかもしれない。2021〜23年は投手で平均4.7 WAR、2024〜25年は打者で平均7.9 WAR。両方をフルシーズンやったら何ができるか、見てみようぜ

comments.author: GregMilkedJack
comments.bodyEn: Not sure if I'm just reading the headline wrong or what but it just seems like a weird quote. What else would say? "I plan on getting hurt around July"
comments.bodyJa: 見出しの読み方が悪いだけかもだけど、なんか変な発言じゃない？他に何て言うんだよ。『7月あたりに故障する予定です』とでも？

comments.author: Radiant_Jury5815
comments.bodyEn: Because that was added by a reporter from ESPN. In the original interview, Ohtani only said he hoped to "Stay healthy throughout the entire season."
comments.bodyJa: それESPNの記者が後から盛った部分だから。元のインタビューで大谷は『1年間ずっと健康でいたい』としか言ってないんだよ

comments.author: 5amDan05
comments.bodyEn: He's betting on it…
comments.bodyJa: 本人がそれに“賭けてる”んだよ…（※通訳のギャンブル騒動ネタ）

comments.author: VendettaKarma
comments.bodyEn: Don't worry the "Race to Shohei's Cy" updates will flash at the bottom of your screen regardless every time he takes a piss.
comments.bodyJa: 安心しろ、どうせ『翔平のサイ・ヤング獲得レース』速報が、あいつが小便するたびに画面下にテロップで流れるから

comments.author: jesterspaz
comments.bodyEn: Even if there is an off chance - you've gotta respect the hustle and the way this man plans for big things. So far it's worked out for him, let him cook.
comments.bodyJa: たとえ可能性が薄くても、このデカい目標を立てて突き進む姿勢はリスペクトすべきだろ。今まで全部実現してきたんだ、好きにやらせとけ

comments.author: Just-Faithlessness12
comments.bodyEn: He will be his teammate by the deadline. Don't worry
comments.bodyJa: （サイ・ヤング獲りそうな投手は）どうせトレード期限までに大谷のチームメイトになってるから。心配すんな
